title: Hidden Travel Costs: Mobile Data Prices in Top Tourist Cities
description: Planning your dream vacation? While you're budgeting for hotels and attractions, don't forget about staying connected.
body:
Planning your dream vacation? While you're budgeting for hotels and attractions, don't forget about staying connected. We've analyzed mobile data costs and coverage quality across major tourist destinations to help you plan smarter.

Cities with Outstanding Connectivity

Tokyo, Japan

  • Lightning-fast 5G coverage
  • Extensive public WiFi
  • Reliable underground connectivity
  • Get your Japan eSIM

Seoul, South Korea

  • World-leading internet speeds
  • Comprehensive subway coverage
  • Affordable data packages
  • Browse Korea eSIM options

Singapore

  • Nearly 100% 4G/5G coverage
  • Smart city infrastructure
  • Consistent speeds throughout
  • Secure your Singapore eSIM

Cities Where You'll Need to Plan Ahead

Venice, Italy

  • Historical architecture affects signal
  • Limited public WiFi
  • Higher data costs
  • Check our Italy coverage

Santorini, Greece

  • Island location challenges
  • Peak season congestion
  • Variable coverage areas
  • View Greece eSIM options

Smart Travel Tips

  1. Download offline maps before arrival
  2. Pre-purchase your travel eSIM
  3. Enable data-saving modes
  4. Use WiFi when available

Don't let connectivity issues surprise you. Plan ahead with our global coverage.
